subcodes.first_line: O Ghulam Qabl-i-Rida! Upon thee be the Glory of God, the Lord of Names! Thou hast been mentioned in the presence of the Wronged One, and the Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا غلام قبل رضا علیک بهاء الله مالک الاسماء ذکرت در ساحت مظلوم مذکور و قلم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for assistance; intercession, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
